title: user authentication login
description: Test the POST /api/auth/login endpoint for successful login with valid credentials, invalid password, and missing fields to verify authentication and error handling.

title: user registration
description: Test the POST /api/auth/register endpoint for successful user registration with valid data, validation errors on missing fields, and duplicate email handling.

title: voice assistant session management
description: Test the GET /api/voice/session endpoint and socket connection for real-time voice interaction including microphone permission handling, streaming audio, receiving transcription and responses, and error scenarios like expired token and Gemini Live errors.

title: reminder creation and retrieval
description: Test the GET and POST /api/reminders endpoints for creating reminders with valid and invalid data, retrieving reminders list, and authorization enforcement.

title: settings and preferences update
description: Test the GET and POST/PUT /api/settings endpoints for fetching and updating user preferences with valid and invalid data, and handling expired authentication tokens.

title: knowledge rag query handling
description: Test the POST /api/knowledge endpoint for submitting queries to the RAG system, including valid queries, empty or ambiguous queries, and handling external service failures or timeouts.
